description:
Lila Flare ref sheet 

Lila Flare just appeared at the Temple one day without anyone noticing, her Aura's energy signature is similar to that of Nexus' core itself.


Support me at https://ko-fi.com/starlightroseuwu or https://patreon.com/starlightroseuwu <3
